data.metadata: {"description":"Met Leeland in abstract he is an awesome and caring giga chad, and attends stuff IRL too. People like Leeland are who drives Abstract forward."}

translation.translatedDescription: Met Leeland in abstract he is an awesome and caring giga chad, and attends stuff IRL too. People like Leeland are who drives Abstract forward.

data.comment: An Exceptional Developer and Even Better Teammate
data.metadata: {"description":"Coffee is an exceptionally talented developer I’ve had the privilege of working with across multiple companies and projects over the years. He brings deep expertise in web3, unmatched reliability, and a calm, humble approach to every challenge. Always generous with his time and insight, he’s the kind of person everyone wants on their team."}

translation.translatedContent: An Exceptional Developer and Even Better Teammate
translation.translatedDescription: Coffee is an exceptionally talented developer I’ve had the privilege of working with across multiple companies and projects over the years. He brings deep expertise in web3, unmatched reliability, and a calm, humble approach to every challenge. Always generous with his time and insight, he’s the kind of person everyone wants on their team.

data.comment: A Creative Mind Who Elevates Every Project
data.metadata: {"description":"Nix is a rare mix of artist and developer who keeps pushing creative boundaries. He brings fresh ideas, solid execution, and great energy to every project. He’s someone I genuinely look forward to collaborating with again."}

translation.translatedContent: A Creative Mind Who Elevates Every Project
translation.translatedDescription: Nix is a rare mix of artist and developer who keeps pushing creative boundaries. He brings fresh ideas, solid execution, and great energy to every project. He’s someone I genuinely look forward to collaborating with again.

data.metadata:
{"description":"Mon frère d’arme, Leeland, est un créateur incroyablement talentueux, toujours débordant d’idées et d’énergie.
Il m’a énormément inspiré dans mes propres créations, et j’ai pris un réel plaisir à collaborer avec lui sur le projet de mèmes pour le lancement du mainnet d’Abstract et de sa mascotte Abster.
Travailler à ses côtés, c’est bénéficier d’une vision créative unique, d’une grande rigueur, mais aussi d’une vraie bienveillance.
Toujours présent pour donner des conseils avisés, partager son expérience ou simplement prêter une oreille attentive, il incarne parfaitement l’esprit de collaboration et de passion qui fait la force de notre communauté."}

translation.translatedDescription:
My brother in arms, Leeland, is an incredibly talented creator, always overflowing with ideas and energy.
He has greatly inspired me in my own creations, and I have taken real pleasure in collaborating with him on the meme project for the launch of Abstract's mainnet and its mascot Abster.
Working alongside him means benefiting from a unique creative vision, great rigor, but also genuine kindness.
Always there to give sound advice, share his experience, or simply lend a listening ear, he perfectly embodies the spirit of collaboration and passion that makes our community so strong.

data.metadata: {"description":"Mic’s a Vietnam Gigachad. solid Abstract contributor, always active and dropping real alpha in the chats. humble, consistent, zero red flags, just pure builder energy. A trusted member who connects people, builds bridges, and pushes the ecosystem forward"}

translation.translatedDescription: Mic’s a Vietnam Gigachad. solid Abstract contributor, always active and dropping real alpha in the chats. humble, consistent, zero red flags, just pure builder energy. A trusted member who connects people, builds bridges, and pushes the ecosystem forward

data.metadata: {"description":"Val_ is an OG Abstract; he was present during the Abstract testnet. He and the team behind Ozy were the first to launch a collection on the Abstract Testnet.\n\nHe is very active within the ecosystem, using almost all of the apps offered today on Abstract and supporting them on X. He is an honest person who is not afraid to support what he loves."}

translation.translatedDescription:
Val_ is an OG Abstract; he was present during the Abstract testnet. He and the team behind Ozy were the first to launch a collection on the Abstract Testnet.

He is very active within the ecosystem, using almost all of the apps offered today on Abstract and supporting them on X. He is an honest person who is not afraid to support what he loves.

data.metadata: {"description":"Curtis is an incredibly talented full stack engineer. Having worked with him for a few years at multiple diffent job, I can attest that he is an incredibly hard working individual and able to solve a myriad of complex problems across the stack.\n\nAs a contributor to Abstract he has helped dramatically increase our velocity shipping new features and is an invaluable member of the team."}

translation.translatedDescription:
Curtis is an incredibly talented full stack engineer. Having worked with him for a few years at multiple diffent job, I can attest that he is an incredibly hard working individual and able to solve a myriad of complex problems across the stack.

As a contributor to Abstract he has helped dramatically increase our velocity shipping new features and is an invaluable member of the team.

translation.translatedDescription:
I met Sanjay through a mutual friend (Elisa), and since knowing him I've been extremely drawn to his unique, progressive takes on everything from finance to business, AI and loads more.

Sanjay hosts a weekly podcast with Elisa called 'New Wave' - a must-watch for me to get my fix of tech topics through a human/approachable lens. Food for thought and would wholeheartedly recommend!

A genuine human being (and penguin).

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "퍼지 펭귄 우크라이나를 이끄는 동시에 Abstract의 Giga Chad입니다. 적극적으로 커뮤니티를 이끌며 팟캐스트, 음악, 스페이스, 밈 등으로 양질의 정보를 알려주고 분위기를 띄웁니다.

그리고 이 친구 남자가 봐도 상당히 잘생겼어요.

제가 MAXIMUS의 콘텐츠 중 가장 기억나는 3가지가 있어요.

첫 번째

Pudgy Penguins와 BE@RBRICK의 콜라보레이션 장난감 언박싱 영상입니다. 처음부터 씰을 뜯고 개봉해서 실제 어느 정도 크기인지, 어떻게 생겼는지 자랑하는 콘텐츠였는데 이건 나도 가지고 싶다는 생각이 들었습니다.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/2003798322793025617?)

두 번째

Abstract 1주년 기념으로 랩을 작사·작곡 후 직접 불렀는데 Abstract에 대해 진정성 있는 애정이 있구나 하는 생각이 들었어요. 재미있는 점은 Abstract의 메인넷을 출시했을 때도 랩을 직접 작사·작곡 후 불렀더라고요? 한번 들어 보는 것을 추천합니다.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/2014684572437422121)

세 번째

이글루의 창립자 Luca Netz와의 팟캐스트인데 PENGU ETF 현황이 어떻게 흘러가고, 정부에 로비를 어떻게 하고 있는지, 지금 진행하고 있는 파트너십, NFT의 가치를 어떤 방식으로 키워 나가고 싶고, 2026년부터는 제품의 품질을 올리는 전략까지 상당히 많은 Alpha 정보를 들을 수 있어서 많이 좋은 시간이었습니다.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/1999164007647969755)

Giga Chad들을 유심히 지켜보면 상당히 각자의 분야에서 다양한 재주를 가지고 있는데 적재적소에 Abstract에 쓰이고 있는 것 같아서 생태계에 있는 저로서는 매우 기분이 좋았습니다.

MAXIMUS의 피드를 꼭 둘러보시길... 최근에는 유튜브도 개설 했습니다."
}

translation.translatedDescription:
He leads Pudgy Penguins Ukraine and is also Abstract's Giga Chad. He actively leads the community, providing quality information and boosting the atmosphere through podcasts, music, Spaces, memes, and more.

And this guy is quite handsome, even from a man's perspective.

Here are the three things I remember most from MAXIMUS's content:

First

A video of unboxing the Pudgy Penguins and BE@RBRICK collaboration toy. It was content that showed off the actual size and appearance by tearing the seal and opening it from the beginning, and it made me want to have it too.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/2003798322793025617?)

Second

He wrote, composed, and sang a rap to commemorate Abstract's 1st anniversary, which made me think he had a genuine affection for Abstract. Interestingly, he also wrote, composed, and sang a rap when Abstract's mainnet was released? I recommend giving it a listen.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/2014684572437422121)

Third

A podcast with Igloo's founder, Luca Netz, where I was able to hear a lot of Alpha information, such as how the PENGU ETF is progressing, how they are lobbying the government, the partnerships they are currently pursuing, how they want to increase the value of NFTs, and even the strategy to improve product quality from 2026. It was a very good time.
(https://x.com/maximusss/status/1999164007647969755)

If you look closely at the Giga Chads, they have quite a variety of talents in their respective fields, and it seems like they are being used appropriately in Abstract, which makes me, as someone in the ecosystem, feel very good.

Be sure to check out MAXIMUS's feed... He recently opened a YouTube channel as well.

data.author: 0xE1F3ef504b0C24aA4F790D26d6EA451b40a0c863
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000

translation.translatedDescription: KangBokSoon has been very supportive of me.  Every interaction we have is always pleasant.  KangBokSoon even has given me lots of support by having him and his friends join my Telegram channel.

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata:
{
  "description": "Rubiks는 Abstract 초창기 나의 우상이었습니다. Abstract Portal 초반에는 Dapp이 많이 없어서 XP를 얻는 게 정말 힘들었는데... 이 사람은 압도적으로 많이 얻었어요.

당시 $PENGU와 $ABSTER를 정말 많이 보유했는데 그래서 XP를 많이 받았던 거 같아요.

X에 매일매일 위 두 코인을 쉴링했고, 지금까지도 차트를 그리며 "펭구, 앱스터 가즈아!"를 외치고 있습니다. Rubiks는 말만 하는 게 아니고 $ABSTER를 최고점에서도 팔지 않고, 지금까지 코인을 가지고 있는 것으로 기억합니다.

최근 Abstract의 DeFi 코인 $ABX 또한 살펴보고 조금씩 매수하고 있습니다.

또한 개인 텔레그램도 운영하고 있어요. 여기에는 Abstract뿐만 아니라 다양한 알파 정보들이 있습니다. 대표적으로 Solana 계열의 Meme 코인 $KNET, $M0N3Y, $TROLL 등 메가 히트를 달성한 코인을 발굴한 전적이 있어요. 덕분에 저도 소액 매수하여 이득을 봤습니다.

실제로 얼굴도 공개해서 신뢰감이 있다고 생각합니다. 젊은 친구인데 능력 있는 게 대단해요."
}

translation.translatedContent: Guardian of Pengu and Abster, Rubiks
translation.translatedDescription:
Rubiks was my idol from the early days of Abstract. In the early days of Abstract Portal, it was really hard to earn XP because there weren't many Dapps... but this person earned an overwhelming amount.

I think he received a lot of XP because he held a lot of $PENGU and $ABSTER at the time.

He shilled the above two coins on X every day, and even now, he's still drawing charts and shouting, "Pengu, Abster, let's go to the moon!" Rubiks doesn't just talk; I remember that he didn't sell $ABSTER even at its peak and still holds the coins.

Recently, he's also been looking into Abstract's DeFi coin, $ABX, and buying it little by little.

He also runs a personal Telegram channel. It contains not only Abstract information but also various alpha insights. For example, he has a track record of discovering mega-hit coins in the Solana ecosystem, such as Meme coins $KNET, $M0N3Y, and $TROLL. Thanks to him, I also made a profit by buying a small amount.

I think he's trustworthy because he actually reveals his face. He's a young guy, but it's amazing how capable he is.

data.comment: A True Giga Chad & Core Community Leader

translation.translatedContent: A True Giga Chad & Core Community Leader
translation.translatedDescription: One of the strongest members of the Abstract community, very friendly and super engaging. Flockinho has always been one of the strong voices in the Abstract community, well respected across many communities and in CT. We are both members of the Pudgy community, and only positive things are said about Flockinho. Super happy to have him and to move the narrative forward together. A true gem, an awesome friend, and a free spirit. Well known, well respected, and definitely a certified Giga Chad.

data.author: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a
data.subject: 0x25954Fb49bFc6A2A09770be5CCA756c8676F31ba

translation.translatedDescription:
I had the pleasure of meeting Becca in Dubai this year for Token 2049. She was one of the kindest and nicest people to come up to me and involve me in the activities.

I was able to connect with her on a friendly level and realize what a hard-working woman she is. She is remarkable and has made so much impact in Web3, not only through her job at AP, but also in the wider Pudgy Penguin Ecosystem.

It's been a joy to watch her live her dreams, achieve her goals, and now being part of the team.
